title: Frostsplitter — The Blade of Eternal Winter
description: Unleash the power of eternal winter with the Frostsplitter, a mythical sword that freezes enemies, deals extra damage in icy biomes, and extinguishes fire mobs with a single strike. Perfect for players who wield the cold as their weapon.
body:
🧊 Frostsplitter — The Blade of Eternal Winter

Forge & Fabric compatible ❄️

Unleash the chilling power of winter with the Frostsplitter, a legendary sword forged from the purest ice and ancient magic. This weapon isn’t just another blade — it’s a weapon of the frozen gods. Every swing freezes your enemies in place, slows their movements, and strikes with the force of an avalanche.

⚔️ Features:

At every hit the sword freezed the target.

Deals +2 bonus damage when standing on snow or ice.

Gains a +50% damage boost in snowy or frozen biomes.

Deals extra damage to fire-based mobs (like Blazes and Magma Cubes) and temporarily extinguishes them.

Emits frosty mist and icy particle effects for a true winter aesthetic.

🧩 Crafting Recipe:
Combine Packed Ice, Blue Ice, a Diamond Sword, and an Amethyst Shard to forge the Frostsplitter.

📜 Lore:

“A blade so cold it cuts not through flesh, but through time itself — freezing the moment.”

Whether you want to roleplay as an ice warrior, challenge fiery Nether mobs, or simply wield one of the coolest weapons in Minecraft, the Frostsplitter brings a fresh chill to your adventures.
